text:
Market today: The mood is sour with a worsening economic outlook, and semiconductor stocks are slumping, which directly hits your concentrated tech/chip book. Rising oil prices add to macro uncertainty.

Your holdings: SOXL (-44.02%) and SPAL (-41.51%) are leveraged and deep underwater; these need immediate attention due to their decay and margin amplification. QQQ, SMH, and QQQI are also flagged for trimming.

Watch: Keep a close eye on any further news regarding semiconductor performance and the escalating oil prices/geopolitical tensions, as these are major drivers for your portfolio.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your outsized leveraged losses and respecting your stops in this uncertain market.
plays: SOXL & SPAL: Both leveraged ETFs are deep in the red. Review stops (SOXL default 200, SPAL 21.38) and consider trimming to reduce amplified risk.
GUSH: With oil prices surging, the scanner flags ACCUMULATE. Entry 35.55-35.52, stop 35.43.
